description: Route each line of stdin to files or commands by regex; unmatched lines pass through to stdout.
prefer_default_when: single-sink filtering by pattern — use grep, Select-String, or files --content
transforming lines (substitutions, field extraction) — use awk or sed
copying one stream to N identical sinks — use tee

options.description: Structured JSON metadata for AI agents
Broadcast: route to every matching route (default: first-match)
File targets append instead of truncate
A watched child's non-zero exit makes demux exit 2
Test the regex against column N (1-based) instead of the whole line
Coloured output: auto (default when omitted), always, or never

exit_codes.description: Success — all input routed and delivered
Partial delivery failure — a route died, records undelivered
Setup failure — could not open a --to file or launch the shell

examples.command: cat app.log | demux --to ERROR err.log --default-exec 'gzip > rest.gz'
examples.description: Split errors into a file, compress the rest

composes_with.description: Copy error lines to the clipboard, file the rest

json_output_fields.name: routes
json_output_fields.description: Per-route {label, delivered, undelivered, dead, child_exit_code, killed_after_timeout}
